Pirlo: Football has changed and you need fast players now
articles.description: “Football always changes and it changes quickly,” Andrea Pirlo tells Sky Sports . “It has become much more physical, much faster. In fact, if you want to win now, you need players who are fast and technically good one-on-one. Otherwise, you go nowhere.”
